item.title: EasyRec 1.22
item.description:
easyRec 1.22

Meeting reports overhauled — far higher quality, plus a new cloud/local Claude backend.

  • New "Claude (cloud)" AI backend: use the Anthropic API for top-quality reports, or point it at a local Anthropic-compatible server (e.g. omlx). API key stored securely in the Keychain.
  • New rolling "refine" pipeline for long transcriptions: keeps decisions and action items from the whole meeting instead of just the final minutes (the old map-reduce was lossy).
  • Speaker-attributed action items: when diarization is on, the report knows who agreed to do what.
  • Ollama: configurable context window (num_ctx) so long transcriptions are no longer silently truncated to 2048 tokens.
  • Larger output budget for meeting reports (4096 tokens) and safer token estimation for non-English transcripts.
  • Qwen 2.5 32B added as an MLX option for machines with 32GB+ unified memory.
